item.title: A 74.6% Year-to-Date Decline Pushes Getalong Enterprise Ltd to Its Weakest Level Ever
item.description: The stock of Getalong Enterprise Ltd has plunged to an all-time low, closing at Rs 4.55 on 24 Mar 2026, marking a staggering 74.64% decline over the past year. This sharp fall comes despite some pockets of financial stability, raising questions about the underlying factors driving the persistent weakness in the share price. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: RIR Power Electronics Ltd Surges 7.07% to Day's High of Rs 154.8 — Outperforms Sector by 4.31 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex gained 1.96% on 24 Mar 2026, but RIR Power Electronics Ltd outpaced the market with a 7.07% rally, reaching an intraday high of Rs 154.8. This 4.31-percentage-point outperformance over its sector, Electronics - Components, which rose 2.98%, highlights a distinctly stock-specific surge rather than a broad market lift. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Abbott India Ltd. Rallies 5.41% and Approaches 50 DMA Resistance — A Key Technical Test Ahead
item.description: The Sensex gained 1.95% on 24 Mar 2026, yet Abbott India Ltd. outperformed with a 5.41% surge, touching an intraday high of Rs 27,001.6. This 3.46-percentage-point outperformance signals a stock-specific strength amid a broader market that remains under pressure, raising the question of whether this rally marks a genuine recovery or a technical rebound within a mixed trend. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Religare Enterprises Ltd Surges 7.22% to Day's High of Rs 216.85 — Outperforms Sector by 5.15 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex gained 1.95% on 24 Mar 2026, yet Religare Enterprises Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector with a 7.22% surge, reaching an intraday high of Rs 216.85. This 5.15 percentage-point outperformance signals a stock-specific strength that demands a closer look at the underlying technical and market dynamics. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Swiggy Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Swiggy Ltd, a prominent player in the E-Retail and E-Commerce sector, witnessed a significant 18.3% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 24 Mar 2026, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite trading close to its 52-week low, the stock outperformed its sector and showed signs of a potential trend reversal, though technical indicators remain cautious amid a strong sell rating. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Delhivery Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Delhivery Ltd, a key player in the transport services sector, witnessed a notable 17.2% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 24 Mar 2026, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this spike, the stock underperformed its sector and broader indices, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish and bearish sentiments among traders. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Jio Financial Services Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Rising Market Activity
item.description: Jio Financial Services Ltd witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment on 24 Mar 2026, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. The stock outperformed its sector peers with a 2.76% gain, supported by increased volumes and a strong uptick in futures and options participation, reflecting renewed directional bets amid a broader NBFC sector rally. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Eternal Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Derivatives Activity
item.description: Eternal Ltd, a large-cap player in the E-Retail and E-Commerce sector, witnessed a significant 10.9% rise in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 24 Mar 2026, signalling heightened market participation and potential directional bets. This surge accompanies a robust 4.96% intraday price gain, outpacing both its sector and the broader Sensex, underscoring renewed investor interest despite a recent downgrade in its Mojo Grade to Sell. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Market Positioning
item.description: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd, the parent company of NYKAA, witnessed a significant 15.22% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment on 24 Mar 2026, reflecting heightened market activity and a potential shift in investor sentiment towards a bullish stance. This increase accompanies a 2.47% rise in the stock price, outperforming its sector and broader indices, signalling renewed optimism among traders and investors alike. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd (SONACOMS) has witnessed a notable 11.09% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite underperforming its sector marginally today, the stock’s rising volumes and open interest suggest evolving directional bets that merit close attention from traders and investors alike. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Lodha Developers Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Prolonged Price Decline
item.description: Lodha Developers Ltd (LODH) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, rising by 29.31% to 67,984 contracts from 52,575 previously. This spike comes despite the stock hitting a fresh 52-week low of ₹715.45 and underperforming its sector, signalling complex market positioning and potential directional bets by investors. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd (MAXHEALTH) has witnessed a notable 14.0% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this, the stock remains close to its 52-week low, reflecting a complex interplay of cautious optimism and sectoral headwinds in the hospital industry. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: HDFC AMC Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Rising Market Activity
item.description: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd (HDFCAMC) witnessed a significant 15.5% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 24 Mar 2026, signalling heightened investor interest and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector peers with a 4.58% gain, reversing a three-day decline and opening with a positive gap, reflecting renewed bullish sentiment despite trading below key moving averages. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Ador Welding Ltd Surges 7.54% to Day's High of Rs 930 — Outperforms Sector by 3.77 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex gained 1.95% on 24 Mar 2026, but Ador Welding Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.54% jump, reaching an intraday high of Rs 930. This 3.77 percentage-point outperformance over its sector, Electrodes & Welding Equipment, which rose 2.02%, signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide surge. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Tube Investments of India Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Market Signals
item.description: Tube Investments of India Ltd (TIINDIA) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector and broader indices on 24 Mar 2026, reflecting renewed investor interest amid evolving market positioning. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: HDFC Life Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd has witnessed a notable 10.0% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite the stock hitting a new 52-week low of ₹590.05, recent trading volumes and futures activity suggest a complex interplay of directional bets amid a cautious sector backdrop. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: SBI Life Insurance Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd has witnessed a significant 15.3% rise in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this surge, the stock underperformed its sector and broader indices, reflecting a complex interplay of market sentiment and technical factors. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: ICICI Lombard Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd has witnessed a notable 13.5% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this, the stock remains close to its 52-week low, reflecting a complex interplay of cautious optimism and underlying bearish sentiment within the insurance sector. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Aditya Birla Capital Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Rising Market Activity
item.description: Aditya Birla Capital Ltd (ABCAPITAL) has witnessed a notable 10.7% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened investor interest and potential shifts in market positioning. This surge accompanies a strong intraday performance, with the stock outperforming its sector and reversing a three-day decline, suggesting renewed bullish sentiment among traders. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Laurus Labs Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amidst Bullish Market Signals
item.description: Laurus Labs Ltd (LAURUSLABS), a mid-cap player in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector, witnessed a significant 11.74% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 24 Mar 2026, signalling heightened market participation and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector peers with a 3.33% gain, reflecting growing investor confidence amid evolving market dynamics. Time: 20 minutes ago
